arts.ttl: Champions League live blog: Real Madrid-Atlético, PSV-Arsenal
arts.sum: Enjoy live updates from Tuesday's Champions League action as Real Madrid take on Atlético Madrid, PSV take on Arsenal and Dortmund take on Lille.

arts.ttl: “He has earned the chance to be in the squad” – Luis de la Fuente on Real Madrid defender Raul Asencio
arts.sum: Raul Asencio has been a standout performer for Real Madrid over the last few months, and that has earned him a regular starting spot. Because of this, he has also been tipped to feature for the Spanish national team in the coming months. As per Marca, La Roja head coach Luis de la Fuente has […] The post “He has earned the chance to be in the squad” – Luis de la Fuente on Real Madrid defender Raul Asencio appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid Become First Team in History to Reach Champions League Milestone
arts.sum: Real Madrid are now the first and only club in Champions League history to play 500 matches in the European competition.

arts.ttl: Jude Bellingham’s absence explained by Carlo Ancelotti
arts.sum: Real Madrid are looking to bounce back from a poor run of form in LaLiga when they take on city rivals Atlético Madrid in the Champions League on Tuesday. Yellow cards in the Champions League are cleared after the quarter-finals but Madrid have a number of players who could easily pick up their third booking before that point.
